item.title: Tips and Tricks: Porch Roof Edition
item.description: Practical tips and field-tested tricks for building and improving porch roofs, focusing on cleaner installs, better alignment, and fewer mistakes on site.

media:content.media:title: Tips and Tricks: Porch Roof Edition
media:content.media:description: Practical tips and field-tested tricks for building and improving porch roofs, focusing on cleaner installs, better alignment, and fewer mistakes on site.

item.title: I thought this was IMPOSSIBLE!
item.description: A challenging moment turns into a breakthrough as something that seemed impossible finally gets figured out. With the right approach and a bit of problem-solving, even the toughest tasks start to make sense.

media:content.media:title: I thought this was IMPOSSIBLE!
media:content.media:description: A challenging moment turns into a breakthrough as something that seemed impossible finally gets figured out. With the right approach and a bit of problem-solving, even the toughest tasks start to make sense.

item.title: Building a Dream Home Episode 37
item.description: Episode 37 follows the ongoing home build with a focus on construction progress, craftsmanship, and the tools and methods used on site. A practical look at the building process from start to finish.

media:content.media:title: Building a Dream Home Episode 37
media:content.media:description: Episode 37 follows the ongoing home build with a focus on construction progress, craftsmanship, and the tools and methods used on site. A practical look at the building process from start to finish.

item.title: The Foundation of a House - The Concrete Layer!
item.description: A look at the essential concrete foundation layer that supports an entire house, focusing on strength, stability, and proper installation techniques. Why is this layer so critical for long-term structural integrity?

media:content.media:title: The Foundation of a House - The Concrete Layer!
media:content.media:description: A look at the essential concrete foundation layer that supports an entire house, focusing on strength, stability, and proper installation techniques. Why is this layer so critical for long-term structural integrity?

item.title: The 3 Magic Numbers for House Layout
item.description: Great home layouts often come down to a few key measurements that improve flow, comfort, and usability. Learn the three important numbers that can make all the difference when planning a space.

media:content.media:title: The 3 Magic Numbers for House Layout
media:content.media:description: Great home layouts often come down to a few key measurements that improve flow, comfort, and usability. Learn the three important numbers that can make all the difference when planning a space.

item.title: How to Transform a Living Space with a Simple Trick
item.description: A small design change can completely alter the look, feel, and functionality of a room. Discover how a simple trick can make a living space feel larger, brighter, and more inviting.

media:content.media:title: How to Transform a Living Space with a Simple Trick
media:content.media:description: A small design change can completely alter the look, feel, and functionality of a room. Discover how a simple trick can make a living space feel larger, brighter, and more inviting.

item.title: Tips & Tricks for Fitting Doors the Right Way
item.description: A practical guide to fitting doors accurately, focusing on alignment, clearance, and small adjustments that make a big difference in how smoothly a door operates. What are the key details that prevent sticking, gaps, or misalignment?

media:content.media:title: Tips & Tricks for Fitting Doors the Right Way
media:content.media:description: A practical guide to fitting doors accurately, focusing on alignment, clearance, and small adjustments that make a big difference in how smoothly a door operates. What are the key details that prevent sticking, gaps, or misalignment?

item.title: Builder and maker submissions are already impressing
item.description: A showcase of creative builder and maker projects that stand out for their craftsmanship, innovation, and execution. Which build is the most impressive so far?

media:content.media:description: A showcase of creative builder and maker projects that stand out for their craftsmanship, innovation, and execution. Which build is the most impressive so far?

item.title: The Framing Is Almost Done
item.description: Framing work is nearly complete, showing steady progress on the build and the hands-on process behind the structure. A practical look at job site craftsmanship and construction progress.

media:content.media:title: The Framing Is Almost Done
media:content.media:description: Framing work is nearly complete, showing steady progress on the build and the hands-on process behind the structure. A practical look at job site craftsmanship and construction progress.

item.title: Laying the Foundations for a Farmhouse Build
item.description: A look at the foundation work for a farmhouse build, focusing on the early construction process and site progress. Practical building steps and hands-on work set the stage for the project.

media:content.media:title: Laying the Foundations for a Farmhouse Build
media:content.media:description: A look at the foundation work for a farmhouse build, focusing on the early construction process and site progress. Practical building steps and hands-on work set the stage for the project.

item.title: Building comfort, style, and quality from the ground up
item.description: A look at the building process focused on comfort, style, and quality from the ground up. Practical construction work, craftsmanship, and project progress come together on site.

media:content.media:description: A look at the building process focused on comfort, style, and quality from the ground up. Practical construction work, craftsmanship, and project progress come together on site.

item.title: Episode 31: Building a Dream Home
item.description: Episode 31 follows the building process for a dream home, focusing on construction progress and hands-on work on site. A practical look at craftsmanship, tools, and project development.

media:content.media:description: Episode 31 follows the building process for a dream home, focusing on construction progress and hands-on work on site. A practical look at craftsmanship, tools, and project development.

item.title: Let's Build Strong Stairs One Step at a Time
item.description: A practical look at building strong stairs, with a focus on the process, tools, and craftsmanship behind each step. What part of the build stands out most?

media:content.media:title: Let's Build Strong Stairs One Step at a Time
media:content.media:description: A practical look at building strong stairs, with a focus on the process, tools, and craftsmanship behind each step. What part of the build stands out most?
